yeah, and then I also do a lot of, I mean, the whole game with our agencies, like everything we do is like things we try to automate or operationalize.

mean, the help I need, you know, basically somebody who's like super organized, who can kind of understand the tone of like the communication that I try to do.

guess any thoughts or questions?

also learned about automatizations.
